I'M NOT WATCHING ANYTHING STAR WARS UNTIL THEY REHIRE GINA CARANO. That was a line they had no right to cross. Idgaf if "they're a private company and they can do what they want" etc. (they can't btw, they broke discrimination laws and they knew it, that's why they had to pay her big money, which is Kathleen Kennedy's and her lackeys' fault, NOT Gina's).

IT'S THE PRINCIPLE OF THE THING. She did nothing illegal, nothing morally wrong, hell she didn't even do anything even OPTICALLY wrong.

Literally everything she said was objectively correct and good and righteous. I DON'T SUPPORT EVIL. Disney has been on the WRONG side of history just like the rest of Hollywood. They need to git gud or they will only continue to git rekt while others eat their lunch.

author: @justiful01
text:
They baited us with the first two seasons of Mandalorian. Then they fired Gina. The lead actor Pedro Pascal went super political against conservatives. They announced and executed several exceptionally woke projects. . . 

Mando season 1-2 felt like Disney learned their lesson and was giving fans what they actually wanted. Then bait and switch as soon as they felt they got the fans back. Destroying the very shacky goodwill they had earned. 

I say let Star Wars die. I will never return to anything Star Wars that Disney Created, and honestly even the classic films are soured for me after Mark Hamil went full on hate against his fans. The only old properties I like now are the old books and video games.

author: @HillcrestGames
text:
I'm not a big fan of anything Dave Bologna makes. HOWEVER. There's absolutely no chance in hell that, if he was in charge, he would have thrown out George's scripts. And there's no way in hell he would have completely ruined Luke Skywalker's character.
How could literally anyone who has ever existed fix the mess at Lucasfilm if they're starting today? The only way would be to have Baby Yoda somehow change the timeline so that the sequels don't happen, and you make those some kind of alternate reality feverdream that didn't happen.

That's what I would do...

I'd have some kind of giant Time Crystal that Luke, Baby Yoda, and Mando show up at. Baby Yoda is using the crystal to look at the future (watching the sequels in his mind). Meanwhile 3 Sith Time Spirits appear and start fighting the characters. At one point the Siths pull down their hoods and reveal they are Deep Fake Kathleen Kennedy, JJ Abrams, and Rian Johnson, with red eyes and fangs. Baby Yoda finishes watching the sequels, and he pinches his nose like he smells a stinky. And then he uses the force to crack the time crystal, and when he cracks it, you see within the crystal that all of the characters from the sequels are in there screaming because their timeline is being erased. Then he fully shatters the crystal, which eradicates the Sith Time Spirits. Then everyone looks over at Baby Yoda and he farts and giggles, having destroyed the entire sequel universe. Then Luke just has to go to Exegul to cut off the Emperor's head in like 2 seconds, and all of the story threads are clean.
